action.reasoning: Observation: best 0.594 (iter16: replay500/KD0.5-T2/consol5, balanced early~0.48 late~0.7-0.8, val~0.596). Recent iters 17-21 dropped to 0.58-0.35-0.09-0.50-0.21 due to train.py truncation (ends mid-dataset creation at 'tra', missing full train loop/opt/KD/mem update after task0; val stuck ~0.078 during tasks, only consol recovers slightly, task9 acc~0.2). Curves/logs confirm no learning post-task0. Analysis: root cause=workspace truncation of long train.py (incomplete combined_dataloader, training loop, scheduler, best-tracking, memory update AFTER training, KD impl); prior good runs had complete balanced mem (meta+torch.where/randperm), full KD (KL on log_softmax/T**2), per-epoch val/best, post-task mem update, final consol on full buffer. Replay+KD+consol+best-val proven effective. Decision: fully rewrite COMPLETE concise non-truncated train.py matching iter16 params (mem=500/task balanced per-class, epochs/task=6, consol=5@1e-4, Adam(5e-4 wd=1e-5), KD beta=0.5 T=2.0 with proper KLDiv, CosineAnnealing reset per-task, dense logging every20steps+val/best per epoch, deepcopy old_model, update mem AFTER each task train, final best ckpt {'model_state_dict':best}). Keep model.py/predict.py. Expect recover >0.59, target >0.61. Run training then submit_eval.
